title: normalize_family_aware_permutation_design_v1 — promote staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 → family_aware_permutation_design_v1
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='normalize_family_aware_permutation_design'. Reads a previously-captured staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 envelope (by layer_id), coerces types (string identifiers + karyotype enum + n_offspring int), drops rows missing any required identifier or with unknown karyotype, computes n_singleton_blocks for the consumer's degeneracy diagnostic, and emits a typed family_aware_permutation_design_v1 envelope. Lineage preserved via provenance.source_layer_ids. Twin of normalize_tract_classifications / normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events / normalize_local_inv_controls.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 envelope to promote.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias for multi-source converters; single-source actions use source_layer_id.

column_map.description: Maps source column names (as they appear in the staging payload's rows) to canonical family_aware_permutation_design_v1 names. Defaults to identity (the producer-side TSV uses the canonical names per the SPEC §3) — only override if your producer uses different column names.
